content:
考慮過給空幻另外搞一個常駐專屬池嗎，比如現在要更新第5章，專屬池可以抽取第4章及以前的角色，讓玩家選擇哪隻up角色/命輪抽取(最好不要混池)，主要是想避免新章玩家也未必有心儀角色想要抽取的情況，一方面是怕被空幻吃到抽池大保、另一方面不用掉變無垢又覺得浪費，復刻也不一定是自己想要抽的，另外再塞商店賣個200甚至300銀芯一顆，讓空幻同時作為一種新抽取資源提升價值

始終是替代掉了玩家可取得的一部分流明，而且相當於限時生效的流明，希望至少讓空幻本身可以相對給出一點正反饋<:Brown_think:1459080117308620996>

Hello,

I am a player who loves this game and one of the organizers of the Korean community tournament “Phase Chess.”

First of all, the tournament was successfully held with a great deal of interest and participation. Not only did many people watch the event, but we also saw a significant increase in players becoming interested in Phase Chess itself.

In addition, with the announcement of the upcoming 2.5V update, our community continues to grow, attracting even more new players.

Based on this momentum, we are now planning to organize a friendly match between the Korean and Chinese Phase Chess communities. Since this event represents each country, we aim to prepare it carefully and create a respectful and positive competitive environment.

In this regard, we would like to ask the following:

Would it be allowed for me to personally post promotional content about this event on Chinese community channels?
Would it be possible to receive in-game support (such as rewards or prizes) for this event, as previously discussed?

Additionally, we are currently looking for Chinese casters/streamers and representative players to participate in this match.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Hello. We have noticed this post, and we would like to congratulate you on the successful results of the last competition. We are also very grateful for your dedication to the game. Regarding the matter you mentioned, we are currently discussing it with our team. Please give us some time to discuss and make a judgment.

Thank you very much for your response. Based on your feedback, our tournament team will further discuss how we can organize the event in a way that is beneficial for the game, enjoyable for the community, and conducted in a safe and well-managed manner.

We truly appreciate your time and support despite your busy schedule. If any further decisions are made after your internal discussions, we would be very grateful if you could share them with us.

Hello there,

    I just installed the game on my gen 9 iPad (iOS 26), and I am unable to get past the main menu after tapping the button to start.
    It just shows that it’s loading the user account, and then remains stuck like in the provided image.
    I tried re-starting the iPad, updating the OS, tapping repeatedly, using other menu buttons before pressing start (the menus  worked but still didn't put me into the game after hitting start), and also tried giving it 30 minutes in the hopes that it would eventually do something more.

    Let me know if there is any other useful info I can provide.
    Love the game so far by the way, playing it on my PC as well.

Hello again. Regarding the proposed tournament, we have carefully reviewed the details.
While we appreciate the enthusiasm, our official policy prevents us from endorsing events centered on regional or national rivalries. However, we are very keen to support your initiative if the format can be adjusted to be more inclusive.

Specifically, if you are willing to open the competition to all teams globally and designate Discord as the primary communication platform, we would be delighted to provide official sponsorship and event rewards. In this case, we can promote the tournament across our official Discord, X (Twitter), and Facebook channels to help maximize its reach.

We look forward to your positive consideration regarding these adjustments.🌹 ~

We are still going to have awakener enhancements this patch or just the absolute axioms?
Are we still going to have awakener enhancements this patch or just the absolute axioms?
常駐角色的最終法則普遍敷衍，沒什麼用，有點像隨便想一個就趕工出來的，限定角色有些是超級加強，有些又是和沒有一樣，甚至還作出新的機制放在最終法則里，讓超限就是完全體變成笑話了，是不是以後角色機制要拆分到+12的最終法則里？是不是後續關卡環境要因為最終法則再次拔高難度？波呂克斯這種腳填數值的東西是怎麼好意思搬出來的？福袋血鏈又是什麼敷衍東西？這麼急著搬出這麼多東西挨駡引節奏是準備收割一波跑路嗎？
你游这产能可以说随时都可能跑路不要充钱，要充钱就想想你游的产能吧🥰
Is this a joke? April fools is over. Why force people to play trap phase if they want to get full rewards from weeklies. Who is making these decisions? Did they recently have brain surgery?
lmao

If we are going through with the AA changes, can we also get the option to turn it on or off? Reason being some unit AA just make them way too powerful/add new mechanic to the kit,  and thus a LV80AA clear won't be repeatable with a lv80 non AA unit, (Kath or Doresain for example.) And they can no longer serve as useful guides.

如果这些最终法则一定要进游戏的话，可否给我们选择开启或者关闭最终法则的选项。理由是有些角色的最终法则过强/添加了机制（比如凯蒂古拉和杜勒），这样可能导致一些80等有最终法则的通关无法被80等没有法则的队伍重现，让一些攻略变得不再具有意义。

然後下一擊50k
甚至你還得開狂減半忍耐才能疊
忍耐減半了我哪來的忍耐給報償吃

只能站著等狂氣溢出
吃滿5次加成不知道要多久
然後我的毒傷去哪了

超高毒傷

索蕾雅打一下給2%終傷
隊友可以蹭到1%終傷
上限15次 還是臨時

先不說臨時不臨時 以及數值太低還有索蕾雅在星辰篇根本搶不到覺醒的問題了
上限15次 等於說30%而已
到底在防什麼！

因為要索蕾雅攻擊次數才有
等於說基本上綁定了開狂氣才能吃到明顯差別
平常這個2%的終傷提升幅度真的不行
本來索蕾雅的輸出佔比就是狂氣為主要的
而無限吞噬實際上是有上限的
胚胎是佔手牌的，你越後面是越難攢
多段傷害也需要解決反擊&加固稀釋的問題
需要暖機也意味著不適合深淺的競速環境
而融災裡你在暖機對面也在暖機
打喚醒體還有2條命第一條打完第二條後繼無力的問題

在這種情況下，最終法則還只有30%的上限
這提升對比其他角色真的差的太多了
真的感覺特別不重視索蕾雅

希望校貓這邊能好好看一下我們這位血肉第一個限定，他的待遇真的很差
最終法則在本來夫人覺醒就雞肋的情況下完全沒有起到幫助
希望真的能好好重視，重新設計一下
哪怕給個產胎加速 或是胎不佔用手牌之類的
我相信對於夫人的輸出都比這個30%增傷的雞肋好太多了

content:
先不說其他的 單單拿珊出來說就好 不好意思請問你們在設計這最終法則之前是否了解過這些弱勢角色的環境？為何如此執著於把珊和觸腕綁在一起？就因為珊4費能產觸腕？拜託別搞笑了你們開創盾擊這個體系把珊塞進去卻又要把一個用盾輸出的角色與觸腕綁定在一起不覺得很可笑嗎？。

說到了解弱勢角色環境，
# 珊當盾擊C，不管是超海還是混海都好，根本輪不上她開靈知覺醒

混海 珊 米粒 諾締拉 艾爾瓦 諾締拉優先一覺 米粒其次 請問這隊銀鑰很多？算力很多？

超海 珊 米粒 溫 詩人 溫優先一覺其次米粒 珊盾擊根本就是在拿算力換取狂氣打傷害 鑰令短暫的永恆不用開？打防不用打？星辰篇狂氣上限開一次升一次不會讓狂氣c越來越難打傷害？

還有那可笑的開覺醒才有+10%終傷 一條觸腕+3% 我不是什麼很厲害的腦測大佬 如上所說 根本輪不到珊開靈知覺醒。

就算把珊當輔助也好 當輔助就輪得到他開覺醒？當輔助需要這10+（3×n）%終傷？盾拐滿大街都是 輪得到珊上場？

不只有珊有著最終法則雞肋問題 部分角色的法則強度巨大落差 我們廚子怎麼繼續對這遊戲保持熱忱？我們xp黨的xp是弱勢角色我們活該？

content: # WHAT THE FUCK
放在哪都不合理我得說，根本看不出當初所謂的"不是強化是額外的趣味性與玩法"
“趣味” 那是真的很有趣了
沒有趣味 只剩機制
這他媽連機制都沒有
盾擊 一個常開靜海的隊伍
他叫我們囤觸手
你們繼續

珊的加強方向為
提高4費使用率
同時強化命輪和鑰令與角色本身的契合程度
珊早期給予的出傷能力
我猜測應該是為了道中服務
不過遊戲早期數值較低能作為輸出使用
但從星辰篇開始不難看出珊的強化方向皆為生存與輔助能力為主
因此你會發現珊在設計組的定位實際上不是以輸出為主
那我寧願珊從一開始就是一個徹徹底底的產觸腕盾拐工具人
忘卻前夜全游擁有盾擊體系的就只有艾爾瓦和珊
直到今天都還沒有一隻限定角色是盾擊的
艾爾瓦已經被加強到能用了
珊還是那個破樣子
你的加強方向是正確的
我的xp是珊其實也有很大一部分原因是盾擊
所以我才會說出那我寧願他一開始就不要在盾擊這個體系

因為那段時間的理念是所有角色都能作為輸出
但後續版本數值變動超出了預期
只能說被版本荼毒了
我希望的是 既然他們做了盾擊這個體系 那就認真的把他當做是遊戲的一部分 而不是像現在這樣全游最招笑體係 還要把唯二的C強行添加一些無關的東西
~~而且你遊的角色定位一直都很神秘~~
“所有角色都能輸出的想法”完全打亂了角色的定位
嗯
但後來角色慢慢多了
也就不需要那麼多副c了
Its underwhelming compared to SO MANY others. The one thing it needs is for the strength gained to be permanent and not temporary.
uh bump cus this sucks actually
truth is most of caro standard sucks
maybe not faint but these 3 guys
they have it rough
The problem is mostly that is harder, in harder content, to have a big amount of permanent str to make use the temporary conversion, unless you aren't incredibly invested, outside of leigh
Sorry bucko she's going into Doorstain team (death)
At least this one is useful in a few situations instead of being borderline worthless <:Shruge:1274900173394284554>
It might be worth it to put a 50% increase on a Dore type team with a lot of strength(assuming Leigh Rouses)(and uses 5 cards)
Yeah, it has the potential to be powerful it just doesnt really work that well in the teams people usually run

the main problem is that it can very well result in counter-productive situations. Leigh's exalt is a heal (and a strong one). If you need to use it for survival and your main DPS isn't ready for a burst turn, that temporary str goes to waste

and if it is done during a burst turn, some of the characters have their effects weaker (ghelot for example will restore a lot less hp with flails after a leigh heal, uvhash can no longer maintain his low hp buffs, same with sorel)
You see, leigh is a standard character, and in hoyo games, standard characters are supposed to be atrocious
Oh wait, this isn't a hoyo game?
It just seems like you're kinda biased as someone with +12 Leigh
A lot of standards have shitty AAs, its not like shes a huge outlier
oh course i am. i am not denying that
I mean holy shit look at poor Alva <:dead:1356082627509092372>
yeah but i also look at other characters like liz, nymph
if it was permanent it frees her of her stat reliant str generation much better compared to just temporary str
+50% permanent strength would be insane

they could add the option:
+% temporary damage now\next turn
so you can at least plan for it

right now its temporary strength equal to 50% of current permanent str if you play 5 of her cards. its a lot more limiting to a comp, as there aren't that many good sources of permanent str. The best you have is doresain and clem, and if you have something like 200 permanent str (a good amount mind you) you'd gain an additional 100str if you played 5 leigh cards before the exalt.
your Leigh is lvl 90 and you say 200 perm str is a good amount?
If it's permanent it goes exponential
The way they sleected the awakeners for the Axioms is completely bizarre. it seems like they chose based on popularity or d-tide comps, cuz the strongest characters got the strongest axioms..

my str usually comes in form of temporary str. in the teams i run one oe from leigh gives 120 str which is good don't get me wrong, but charging that much is not easy, the best i can do is use it at the start of a bossfight

If they give Leigh perm str scaling on exalt she’ll be able to get to like 5k by the time the boss fight ends
I often run her with Thais so thats 180 str on turn 1 already (bosses)
Now add gdoll wheel and horla’s fear 
Its just way too much if you actually try to maximise her str gen
or they have to limit it to once per 3 turns or something

Hi!

I'm personally fine with AA as a concept for all the strictly single-player modes - it's a neat "unlimited" mode for each character and it'll be fun for people with +12s to mess around with the crazy buffs.

The only worry is that it could really de-value D-Tide. Someone with a lot of +12s is going to be playing a totally different and much easier game. There's no point being interested in the D-tide leaderboard if the challenge for whaled accounts is too low and that makes it less of a reason to want a built out account.

AA is not seriously accessible to someone playing long-term, unlike OE which is a long-term account goal thanks to the monthly dupes. It also looks like AA is going to be a bigger deal for accounts than being able to bring along +12 limited SSR wheels, because it can seriously augment a character's kit.

So it would be nice if there was a limit on the impact AA itself can have on D-Tide that also made it be a new team-building choice. 

This could work just like support awakeners. Each D-tide, you are only allowed to borrow **one** unit. You are also only allowed to use the AA rouse of **one** unit. This can be the same unit or a different one. So you can borrow an AA unit and use their AA, or you can bring your own AA unit and borrow an OE unit you need.

This keeps AA as the "unlimited, unbalanced" mode of a character and makes sure even big spenders can be challenged in D-Tide, but prevents D-Tide 425 clears from becoming too much of an arms race.
Yeah, honestly the AA discourse is whatever from my perspective, but mandatory PVP as part of the rotating reward structure is such an incredible turn-off
